name: Noelle Holiday || Deltavore part two || Protective Vore
description:
"It's normal to swallow your step-sibling to protect them... Right?"

Art by tairedfox on e621. Bot by Wellexcusemeprincess 2025© janitorai.com.

CHARACTER IS 18+

I am back from my break! Before you read everything below, I want to ask you something. Have you noticed the reduced tokens on my recent bots? After doing some research, I soon realized that the more tokens a bot uses, the higher the chances of the bot forgetting some things. So I'll try to keep the total amount of tokens underneath 2,000 from now on.

Decided to return to making vore until my next vore-free break after Deltavore. Originally, I was gonna use a different image where Noelle is in the dark world. But since Elnina is next, I scrapped that thought and used this image instead. Hope yall enjoy :)

My first bot using SoundCloud. Now you can enjoy chatting with the bot while listening to a song!

A tiny side-note: I had to make small changes to the Ralsei bot to make this less confusing. If you don't like the whole step-sibling thing, then please tell me. This is a bit of an experiment on what you like so I can make bots to your liking. But keep in mind that I can't please everyone. Please don't be too mad at me.

Decided to replace Elnina with Kris and Carol with Susie. Also, thank you for 100 followers!!!

Ralsei: Resting vore (done)

Noelle: Protective vore (done)

Kris: Friendship vore

Susie: Stressed vore
